ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 503, DEFENDANTS WHITE CONSOLIDATED INDUSTRIES, INC. AND ELECTROLUX HOME PRODUCTS, INC.'S MOTION TO APPLY COLORADO LAW. HEARING HELD. THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS WHITE CONSOLIDATED INDUSTRIES, INC. AND ELECTROLUX HOME PRODUCTS, INC.'S MOTION TO APPLY COLORADO LAW IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO BE RAISED BEFORE THE TRIAL COURT AGAIN. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFFS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT AN ORDER. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON, REPORTER: PATRICIA RODRIGUEZ OF AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12436

ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 503, DEFENDANT WHIRLPOOL CORPORATION'S JOINDER TO DEFENDANTS WHITE CONSOLIDATED INDUSTRIES, INC. AND ELECTROLUX HOME PRODUCTS, INC'S MOTION TO APPLY COLORADO LAW. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT WHIRLPOOL CORP.'S JOINDER TO WHITE CONSOLIDATED INDUSTRIES, INC. AND ELECTROLUX HOME PRODUCTS, INC.'S MOTION TO APPLY COLORADO LAW IS DENIED AS UNTIMELY. DEFENDANT FAILED TO PROVIDE PROPER NOTICE AS IT E-SERVED ITS JOINDER AND FAILED TO ADD AN ADDITIONAL TWO DAYS' NOTICE PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 1010.6, CRC 2.251. PLAINTIFFS' OBJECTION TO DEFENDANT'S JOINDER BASED ON TIMELINESS IS SUSTAINED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE AN ORDER.) JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON, REPORTER: PATRICIA RODRIGUEZ OF AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12436
